chemo.name: Cytarabine (Ara-C)
notes: Use central venous access only — avoid peripheral line
Mandatory steroid eye drops to prevent conjunctivitis
Check neurological status before each dose (finger-to-nose test)
Avoid in severe renal dysfunction without dose reduction
Hold dose if cerebellar toxicity (nystagmus, ataxia) develops

nursingNotes: Indication: AML consolidation in eligible young/fit patients
Monitor cerebellar signs twice daily due to high neurotoxicity risk
Ensure patient hydration and manage nausea aggressively
Educate patient to report visual changes or unsteady gait
Cytopenias expected — transfusion support may be required
